title: Neviti Glitz & Glamour Black and Gold Party Cups - Pack of 8
features: Feature a black and gold design
Mix and match with other items in the Glitz and Glamour range
description: Product Description Bold party cups from our Glitz and glamour collection, suitable for a range of special occasions. With their dramatic black and gold colour palette, these stylish cups bring some sparkle to your table with their gold foil Star motifs and balloon-style ‘party’ text. Ideal for everything from birthdays to Christmas celebrations, these stylish cups complement other pieces in the range, including plates, Napkins and table confetti. Box Contains 8 x Cups
